artistContext.name: Seth Troxler
artistContext.summary: As a comparable youth on the scene, Seth Troxler's achievements far outweigh his tender age of 22. His Detroit roots are unmistakable and his recent relocation to Berlin has already earned him a place in the elite of the European techno scene. Seth's musical influences include the chirping of crickets, the whirring of space ships, and the sweet sounds of whistling voodoo magic. With much-hyped and played releases on revered labels such as Spectral, Wagon Repair and M_NUS, each join the dots of his distinctive sexy techno sound.

writer.title: Seth Troxler: A Young Force in Techno
writer.subtitle: Detroit roots and Berlin relocation define a distinctive sound.
writer.author: A. Stern
writer.excerpt: Seth Troxler has quickly established himself as a prominent figure in techno despite his young age. His Detroit roots and recent move to Berlin have shaped his distinctive sound.

content.text: Seth Troxler has emerged as a notable figure in the techno scene, with achievements that belie his young age of 22. His sound is deeply influenced by his Detroit roots, and his recent relocation to Berlin has solidified his position within the European techno elite.

Troxler's musical style is characterized by a distinctive blend of techno and minimal elements. His work often incorporates unconventional influences, ranging from the natural sounds of crickets to the imaginative whirring of space ships and the evocative tones of whistling voodoo magic.

He has released music on several respected labels, including Spectral, Wagon Repair, and M_NUS. These releases have contributed to the development of his unique sonic identity, which has been well-received by both critics and audiences.

Recent releases from Troxler include albums such as This Is Then, DJ-Kicks (Seth Troxler) [DJ Mix], Mixmag Presents Seth Troxler: The Illusion Nouveau (DJ Mix), Mixmag Presents Jamie Jones vs. Seth Troxler, and Love Never Sleeps. These works showcase his evolving style and production techniques.

Troxler's rise in the techno scene has been marked by a series of well-received performances and releases. His ability to blend traditional Detroit techno elements with contemporary minimal influences has set him apart from his peers.
